en: She reads books every evening.
We play basketball in the park.

zh: 他因为累了所以早走了。
en: He left early because he was tired.
She walks to school every day.
He likes watching movies.
She is doing her homework now.
They are playing football outside.
It is raining heavily today.

zh: 她一边做作业一边听音乐。
en: She listened to music while doing homework.
They speak English well.

zh: 我们上周末参观了博物馆。
en: We visited the museum last weekend.
She finished her project yesterday.

zh: 他今天早上给我打了电话。
en: He called me this morning.
I will call you tonight.
She is going to study abroad.

zh: 他们很快就会完成工作。
en: They will finish the work soon.
I have already eaten lunch.
She has never been to Paris.

zh: 我们在这里住了五年了。
en: We have lived here for five years.
He has learned piano for three years.
I stayed home because it was raining.

zh: 天冷，所以我穿上了外套。
en: It was cold, so I put on a coat.

zh: 她很累，因为她工作到很晚。
en: She was tired because she worked late.

zh: 如果下雨，我就待在家里。
en: If it rains, I will stay home.

zh: 如果你努力学习，你会通过的。
en: If you study hard, you will pass.

zh: 如果她打来，告诉她我出去了。
en: If she calls, tell her I am out.

zh: 如果我有更多钱，我会去旅行。
en: If I had more money, I would travel.
If I were you, I would apologize.

zh: 如果她知道答案，她会告诉我们。
en: If she knew the answer, she would tell us.
He fell asleep while watching TV.
I will call you when I arrive.
She was reading when I came in.
When I was young, I liked drawing.
Wash your hands before you eat.
She reviewed her notes after class.
I always brush my teeth before bed.
I think that she is right.
He said that he would come.
She knows that practice is important.
I cooked while she set the table.
The book which I borrowed is interesting.

zh: 教过我的那位老师很善良。
en: The teacher who taught me was kind.

zh: 她有一只整天睡觉的猫。
en: She has a cat which sleeps all day.
What you said is very helpful.
I don't know what to do.

zh: 让我惊讶的是她的回答。
en: What surprised me was her answer.
She can speak three languages.
Could you open the window, please?
You should drink more water.
We should respect our teachers.
You must finish your homework first.
She has to leave before six.
It might rain this afternoon.

zh: 她可能不会来参加派对。
en: She may not come to the party.
This bag is bigger than that one.
She runs faster than her brother.

zh: 这是我读过的最有趣的书。
en: This is the most interesting book I have read.
He is the best player on the team.
She is as tall as her mother.
This test is not as hard as the last one.

zh: 她努力学习是为了通过考试。
en: She studied hard to pass the exam.

zh: 他存钱是为了买新手机。
en: He saved money to buy a new phone.

zh: 我早起是为了赶上公共汽车。
en: I woke up early in order to catch the bus.

zh: 她每天锻炼是为了保持健康。
en: She exercises daily in order to stay healthy.

zh: 他太累了，很快就睡着了。
en: He was so tired that he fell asleep quickly.

zh: 这个包太重了，我拿不动。
en: The bag is so heavy that I can't carry it.
She is too young to drive.
The coffee was too hot to drink.

zh: 我认为这部电影真的很好。
en: I think this movie is really good.

zh: 我相信我们能做得更好。
en: I believe we can do better.
In my opinion, reading is important.

zh: 在我看来，我们应该更努力。
en: In my opinion, we should try harder.
I agree with your idea.
I disagree with that decision.
I have visited the Great Wall twice.
I have never eaten sushi before.
He has never lost a game.
This is the first time I have seen snow.

zh: 这是她第一次独自做饭。
en: This is the first time she has cooked alone.
The window was broken by the ball.
English is spoken all over the world.
The homework was finished on time.
The cake was made by my mother.
Where did you go last weekend?
What are you doing right now?
Why did she leave so early?
How long have you studied English?
How often do you exercise?
Who taught you how to cook?
She is smart and hardworking.

zh: 他努力了，但还是失败了。
en: He tried hard, but he failed.

zh: 我早上喜欢喝茶或咖啡。
en: I like tea or coffee in the morning.

zh: 我很累，但我坚持了下去。
en: I was tired. However, I kept going.

zh: 她每天练习，因此进步很快。
en: She practiced every day. Therefore, she improved fast.

zh: 虽然在下雨，我们还是出去了。
en: Although it was raining, we went out.

zh: 虽然他年轻，但非常负责。
en: Although he is young, he is very responsible.
It is important to get enough sleep.
It is hard to learn a new language.
There is no need to worry so much.
You had better finish your homework first.
